_meta.notes: Maps BUILD-SPEC element IDs to template element descriptions. Template IDs (comp-xxx or renamed) TBD — Melania extracts from editor. Gaps are elements missing from template that need manual placement.
_meta.workflow: Option C: Rename template elements in editor to match our BUILD-SPEC IDs. For gaps, add new elements to editor. Run remap script only if template uses IDs that differ from BUILD-SPEC.

header._comment: Template has 12 header elements. Rename each to our BUILD-SPEC ID in Properties panel.

mapping.announcementBar: Template: Announcement strip — 'Free Shipping on all intl. orders over $200' (neon green bg → restyle to sand/coral)
mapping.announcementText: Template: Announcement strip inner text element
mapping.siteLogo: Template: Logo image ('tera' brand → swap to Carolina Futons logo)
mapping.cartIcon: Template: Cart bag icon (shopping bag with count)
mapping.cartBadge: Template: Cart item count badge on cart icon

gaps._comment: Elements NOT in template — add in editor within template header layout

mobileMenuButton.notes: Hamburger icon — mobile only, check if template has responsive nav already

mobileMenuOverlay.notes: Full-screen overlay for mobile menu, hidden default

mobileMenuClose.notes: X close button for mobile menu overlay

templateExtras: Nav: Sofas (category nav) — repurpose or leave as-is, not a named element in our code
Log In button — Wix native member login, no rename needed
Wishlist icon (heart) — Wix native, no rename needed for Phase 1

footer._comment: Template has ~11 footer elements. Close match to BUILD-SPEC.

mapping.footerLogo: Template: Brand name text/image ('tera' → swap to Carolina Futons)
mapping.footerEmailInput: Template: Newsletter email input (inside 'Stay Inspired' form)
mapping.footerHours: Template: Contact info — hours element (combine if single text block)

footerEmailError.notes: Add validation error message below email input

footerEmailSuccess.notes: Add success message 'You're subscribed!' hidden default

templateExtras: TikTok social link — template has TikTok, not in our BUILD-SPEC, leave as-is
Nav links column (Sofas, Lounge Chairs...) — repurpose as our Quick Links column, no individual ID needed
Legal links column — repurpose, no individual ID needed
Copyright text — no ID needed, static content
Newsletter checkbox — template has opt-in checkbox, our code doesn't use it, hide or remove

popups_and_overlays._comment: These are all GAPS — not in template. Add as hidden elements within masterPage.

exitClose.notes: X close button — code uses exitClose, verify ID in masterPage.js

installBanner.notes: PWA install banner, bottom strip, mobile only

sideCartPanel.notes: Slide-out side cart panel, anchored right

justAddedHighlight.notes: 'Just Added' highlight flash on cart item

a11yLiveRegion.notes: ARIA live region for screen reader announcements, aria-live='polite'

headerShippingBar.notes: Secondary shipping info bar below main header

home._comment: Template Home has 8 sections (~40 elements). BUILD-SPEC needs 109. Good foundation; we add our sections.

mapping.heroSection: Template: Hero container/section (full-width, furniture image bg)
mapping.heroTitle: Template: Hero H1 'UNIQUE DESIGNS FOR DISTINCTIVE SPACES'
mapping.heroSubtitle: Template: Hero subtitle/tagline text below H1

heroOverlay.notes: Semi-transparent overlay for text readability over hero image, rgba(58,37,24,0.6)

categories._comment: Template has 4 static collection cards (Sofas, Lounge Chairs, Chairs, Tables). Our code uses a Repeater with 8 categories. Phase 1 option: use template's 4 static cards OR add a Repeater.
categories.strategy: ADD categoryRepeater as a new Repeater element below/replacing the template's static cards. The static cards serve as visual reference for layout.

categoryRepeater.notes: 8 CF category items — Futon Frames, Mattresses, Murphy Beds, Platform Beds, Casegoods, Sale, Wall Huggers, Unfinished Wood

categorySkeleton.notes: Loading skeleton shown while categories load

templateExtras: Static 'Shop by Collections' cards (Sofas, Lounge Chairs, Chairs, Tables) — can HIDE or REMOVE once categoryRepeater is in place

featured_products._comment: Template has 'New In' section (3 products) and 'Best Sellers' (4 products). Map 'New In' → featuredRepeater, 'Best Sellers' → saleRepeater.

mapping.featuredSubtitle: Template: Subtitle text below 'New In' heading
mapping.featuredRepeater: Template: 'New In' product grid repeater (3 products → extend to 4)
mapping.featuredSaleBadge: Template: 'SALE' badge on card (inside featuredRepeater, hidden default)

featuredOriginalPrice.notes: Strikethrough original price for sale items

featuredQuickViewBtn.notes: Opens quick view modal on hover

mapping.saleImage: Template: Sale product card image (inside saleRepeater)
mapping.saleName: Template: Sale product card name (inside saleRepeater)
mapping.salePrice: Template: Sale product card current price (inside saleRepeater)

testimonials._comment: Template does NOT appear to have a testimonials section. Needs to be added.

testimonialSection.notes: Customer testimonials — add below Best Sellers section

newsletter_section._comment: Template has newsletter in FOOTER. We also have a dedicated home page newsletter section in code.

newsletterSection.notes: Add dedicated newsletter signup section on Home page (separate from footer)

custom_sections_gaps._comment: Sections NOT in template — add in Phase 1 where critical, Phase 2+ for extras.

trustBar.notes: 5 trust signals. Template has 'As Seen In' press section — repurpose or add new trustBar strip.

recentSection.notes: Recently viewed products, hidden if empty

ridgelineHeader.notes: Mountain skyline SVG border — Phase 2 illustration work

websiteSchemaHtml.notes: WebSite JSON-LD — add as hidden HtmlComponent on Home page

editorWorkOrder: 1. RENAME: masterPage header — announcementBar, announcementText, siteLogo, navShop, navContact, headerSearchInput, cartIcon, cartBadge
2. RENAME: masterPage footer — footerLogo, footerEmailInput, footerEmailSubmit, footerPhone, footerAddress, footerHours, socialFacebook, socialInstagram, socialPinterest
3. ADD: masterPage — navHome, navSale, navContact (extra nav items), mobileMenuButton/Overlay/Close, sideCartPanel (Phase 1 critical)
4. RENAME: Home hero — heroSection, heroTitle, heroSubtitle, heroCTA, heroBg
5. ADD: Home — categoryRepeater (with 5 children), trustBar (with children)
6. RENAME: Home featured — featuredTitle, featuredSubtitle, featuredRepeater + inner card elements
7. RENAME: Home sale — saleSection, saleRepeater + inner elements
10. DEFER to Phase 2: all popup/overlay elements, quiz CTA, swatch promo, video showcase, recently viewed
